name: Generate Rows
description: Creates new rows of data at the record level using iterative expressions
input: If no input is provided, generates a single sequence. If an input dataset is provided, generates a separate sequence of rows for each input row.
output: Returns a DataFrame with a new column that will contain the generated values.

fields.name: createFieldName
fields.title: Output Column Name
fields.description: Name of the column that will contain the generated values. Each generated value in this column corresponds to one row created by the gem’s iterative process.

fields.name: createFieldType
fields.title: Output Column Type
fields.description: Select the data type of the Record ID column.

fields.name: expressionInit
fields.title: Initialization Expression
fields.description: Sets the starting value for the generation process. This is the value of the first generated row.

fields.name: expressionCond
fields.title: Conditional Expression
fields.description: Determines how long to continue generating rows. Rows are added while this expression evaluates to true. Can reference input columns or the output column value.

fields.name: expressionLoop
fields.title: Loop Expression
fields.description: Specifies how the generated value changes each iteration. Typically an increment, but can be any expression that modifies the output column value.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.title: Max rows per iteration
fields.description: Maximum number of rows generated per sequence.
